channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17067] sanity: test_160n: Error: 'fail to cancel record for cl18'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Arshad <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/05c319f6-7762-4d29-b2d3-51f932b78fe4

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/97387 - 4.18.0-477.15.1.el8_8.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/97387 - 4.18.0-477.15.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

 

CMD: trevis-31vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-31vm2,trevis-31vm3,trevis-31vm4,trevis-31vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0
total: 10000 create in 3.27 seconds: 3056.44 ops/second
CMD: trevis-31vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-31vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"trace inode super iotrace malloc cache info ioctl neterror net warning buffs other dentry nettrace page dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace reada mmap config console quota sec lfsck hsm snapshot layout\"
CMD: trevis-31vm3,trevis-31vm4,trevis-31vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"trace inode super iotrace malloc cache info ioctl neterror net warning buffs other dentry nettrace page dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace reada mmap config console quota sec lfsck hsm snapshot layout\"
CMD: trevis-31vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n debug
CMD: trevis-31vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-31vm2,trevis-31vm3,trevis-31vm4,trevis-31vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param -n debug=0

unlinked 0 (time 1693390605 ; total 0 ; last 0)
total: 10000 unlinks in 6 seconds: 1666.666626 unlinks/second
CMD: trevis-31vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-31vm2 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"trace inode super iotrace malloc cache info ioctl neterror net warning buffs other dentry nettrace page dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace reada mmap config console quota sec lfsck hsm snapshot layout\"
CMD: trevis-31vm3,trevis-31vm4,trevis-31vm5 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param debug=\"trace inode super iotrace malloc cache info ioctl neterror net warning buffs other dentry nettrace page dlmtrace error emerg ha rpctrace vfstrace reada mmap config console quota sec lfsck hsm snapshot layout\"
CMD: trevis-31vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_users
last record 90144
CMD: trevis-31vm4 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param fail_loc=0x8000016c fail_val=0
fail_loc=0x8000016c
fail_val=0
lustre-MDT0000: clear the changelog for cl18 of all records
lustre-MDT0000: clear the changelog for cl18 of all records
lfs changelog_clear: cannot purge records for 'cl18': No such file or directory (2)
changelog_clear: no changelog user: cl18
sanity test_160n: @@@@@@ FAIL: fail to cancel record for cl18 
Trace dump:
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6662:error()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:17978:test_160n()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7002:run_one()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7051:run_one_logged()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6888:run_test()
= /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:17982:main()
  •
item.summary: sanity: test_160n: Error: 'fail to cancel record for cl18'

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
